{{CargoOrgan
|name=Coral King's Crown
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10681
|idx=39
|description=This soft, gentle-looking mane conceals millions of micro-worms. Lifeforms that touch it vanish without a trace — not even the scent of blood remains…
|skill=After being hit, receive the protection of the Coral King, restoring 8.4% of Max HP!
|hp=3054
|def=166
|atk=187
|rush=186
|gene1=In Gene Sims, Lifesteal Rate +30%
|gene2=Per 200 Lotteries drawn, {race} HP +50
Lotteries Drawn: 10000/10000
|gene3=Earth RES +90
|gene4=Per 200 Lotteries drawn, {race} DEF +5
Lotteries Drawn: 10000/10000
|gene5=Lifesteal Effect +15%
|gene7=Lifesteal Effect +15% (Awakened)
|}}
